text:
Tsubashi Street (, Tsubashi-chō—lit. "Tsubashi District") is a district from Zaban City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 5 

Overview

Tsubashi is a district where the Kiriko son leads the hopeful Hunter examinees Gon, Kurapika, and Leorio to the location of where the 287th Hunter Exam would be held at. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

The Kiriko son leads Gon, Kurapika, and Leorio to 2-5-10 (2nd borough, 5th block, 10th building) Tsubashi. At the location, the three are fascinated by the building where the exam site is located; however, they're corrected that it's the building beside it, a greasy spoon restaurant. Taken back by this, Leorio questions if this is an elaborate prank being pulled on them, though the Kiriko son assures Leorio that it is the exam site as someplace conspicuous would stand out more. 

References
